public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as ward mediator.
appearance: Cold-ready layered gear, ward-conscious fastening, and containment-minded kit signal disciplined caution.
manner: Projects readiness without theatricality, as if discipline matters more than spectacle. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a ward mediator still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ward mediator in and around Aurora Crown Commune, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Aurora Crown Commune workable through the obligations of ward mediator while managing the immediate pressure of dome stress in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must keep readiness, command cohesion, and physical security aligned even when politics or scarcity push against discipline. Around Aurora Crown Commune, that usually means carrying dome stress, contamination seepage, ration balancing without letting the role of ward mediator visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Neren Rimebridge will trade useful tactical knowledge if the party solves a security problem too sensitive for ordinary channels.
Neren Rimebridge needs help hardening a position, drilling unreliable auxiliaries, or reading an approaching threat around Aurora Crown Commune.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Weapon discipline, drilled stillness, and practiced readiness mark Neren Rimebridge as someone tied to organized force rather than casual violence. In Aurora Crown Commune, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Sheresh Dome Stewards, Containment Research Concord.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Aurora Crown Commune: drill yards, fortifications, command posts, or exposed routes
